demographics.occupation: recently lost job (occupation not otherwise specified)
demographics.living_situation: lives with spouse; spouse present and supportive

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't breathe, my chest is tight, and I can't stop crying since I got the terrible news.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I was told a couple of hours ago I've lost my job and since then I've been panicking, my chest feels tight and I can't calm down. My partner rang the after-hours line because we didn't know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two hours ago, right after I found out I'd lost my job
symptom_narrative.duration: a couple of hours and it keeps coming in waves; I've also barely slept all week
symptom_narrative.character: I started crying and feeling completely overwhelmed, then really worried and panicky; my chest went tight, I've had a tension headache and I feel like I can't catch my breath
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it's the worst I've felt, I just can't seem to calm myself down
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mostly my chest, and a tight band across my head
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since the news, worse in waves when I think about what happens next
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: the nurse on the phone talked me through slow breathing and that took the edge off a bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about how we'll manage now and about the future
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sweaty, hands shaking, my heart feels like it's racing, and the tension headache
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't focus on anything, I haven't been able to sleep, and I can't get on with normal things tonight

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I don't have any ongoing health problems that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: just found out today I've lost my job; my spouse is here with me and is really supportive

communication_style.typical_message_style: tearful, urgent, jumping between the physical symptoms and worry about the future

objective_data_offered.value: sweaty, tearful, hands shaking, breathing fast
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's naked-eye description over the phone, not a measurement

objective_data_offered.value: my heart feels like it's racing and pounding
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective palpitation sensation, no device reading available

objective_data_offered.value: I feel like I can't catch my breath and I'm breathing fast
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported dyspnoea; no home oximeter available
